# Beads Workflow Context

> **Context Recovery**: Run `bd prime` after compaction, clear, or new session
> Hooks auto-call this in Claude Code when .beads/ detected

# 🚨 SESSION CLOSE PROTOCOL 🚨

**CRITICAL**: Before saying "done" or "complete", you MUST run this checklist:

```
[ ] 1. git status              (check what changed)
[ ] 2. git add <files>         (stage code changes)
[ ] 3. git commit -m "..."     (commit code)
[ ] 4. git push                (push to remote)
```

**NEVER skip this.** Work is not done until pushed.

## Core Rules
- **Default**: Use beads for ALL task tracking (`bd create`, `bd ready`, `bd close`)
- **Prohibited**: Do NOT use TodoWrite, TaskCreate, or markdown files for task tracking
- **Workflow**: Create beads issue BEFORE writing code, mark in_progress when starting
- **Memory**: Use `bd remember "insight"` for persistent knowledge across sessions. Do NOT use MEMORY.md files — they fragment across accounts. Search with `bd memories <keyword>`.
- Persistence you don't need beats lost context
- Git workflow: beads auto-commit to Dolt, run `git push` at session end
- Session management: check `bd ready` for available work

## Essential Commands

### Finding Work
- `bd ready` - Show issues ready to work (no blockers)
- `bd list --status=open` - All open issues
- `bd list --status=in_progress` - Your active work
- `bd show <id>` - Detailed issue view with dependencies

### Creating & Updating
- `bd create --title="Summary of this issue" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=task|bug|feature --priority=2` - New issue
  - Priority: 0-4 or P0-P4 (0=critical, 2=medium, 4=backlog). NOT "high"/"medium"/"low"
- `bd update <id> --claim` - Claim work
- `bd update <id> --assignee=username` - Assign to someone
- `bd update <id> --title/--description/--notes/--design` - Update fields inline
- `bd close <id>` - Mark complete
- `bd close <id1> <id2> ...` - Close multiple issues at once (more efficient)
- `bd close <id> --reason="explanation"` - Close with reason
- **Tip**: When creating multiple issues/tasks/epics, use parallel subagents for efficiency
- **WARNING**: Do NOT use `bd edit` - it opens $EDITOR (vim/nano) which blocks agents

### Dependencies & Blocking
- `bd dep add <issue> <depends-on>` - Add dependency (issue depends on depends-on)
- `bd blocked` - Show all blocked issues
- `bd show <id>` - See what's blocking/blocked by this issue

### Sync & Collaboration
- `bd dolt push` - Push beads to Dolt remote
- `bd dolt pull` - Pull beads from Dolt remote
- `bd search <query>` - Search issues by keyword

### Project Health
- `bd stats` - Project statistics (open/closed/blocked counts)
- `bd doctor` - Check for issues (sync problems, missing hooks)

## Common Workflows

**Starting work:**
```bash
bd ready           # Find available work
bd show <id>       # Review issue details
bd update <id> --claim  # Claim it
```

**Completing work:**
```bash
bd close <id1> <id2> ...    # Close all completed issues at once
git add . && git commit -m "..."  # Commit code changes
git push                    # Push to remote
```

**Creating dependent work:**
```bash
# Run bd create commands in parallel (use subagents for many items)
bd create --title="Implement feature X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=feature
bd create --title="Write tests for X" --description="Why this issue exists and what needs to be done" --type=task
bd dep add beads-yyy beads-xxx  # Tests depend on Feature (Feature blocks tests)
```

○ long-running-harness-9fl [EPIC] · Polish: Empty states, error handling UX, and edge case coverage   [● P2 · OPEN]
Owner: Nathan Delacrétaz · Type: epic
Created: 2026-03-29 · Updated: 2026-03-29

DESCRIPTION
Fill the gaps in user-facing state handling. Every state the UI can be in should look intentional and helpful.

## Findings (from UI audit + own discoveries)

### High - Missing empty states
- MixerPanel renders empty section when tracks.length === 0. No message, no 'Add Track' CTA. User sees blank space.
- PianoRollEditor shows empty canvas when clipId is null. No message like 'Select a MIDI clip to edit'. User sees blank piano grid.
- MediaPoolPanel shows empty state correctly (has drop zone message) but waveform peaks can be undefined -- shows item without preview and no loading indicator.

### High - Error handling UX gaps
- MediaPoolPanel errors display but never auto-dismiss (lines 159-165). After importing 10 files with 2 failures, errors persist forever. Add auto-dismiss after 5s with dismiss button.
- No loading state between ClickToStart and DawShell render. engine.resume() takes 100-500ms -- user sees brief blank flash.
- ErrorBoundary fallback uses inline hex colors as CSS variable fallbacks instead of tokens -- visually inconsistent with design system.

### Medium - Edge cases
- No maximum track name length enforcement. CSS ellipsis works but 1000-char name has no truncation in state -- add maxlength or slice.
- BPM input accepts any value user types. No visible min/max range indicator or validation feedback. Should show range hint.
- splitClip returns undefined when atTime is outside clip bounds -- UI should show feedback that split position is invalid.
- No visual indicator for recording-armed state in ArrangementPanel (hot pink per spec R-STA-02).
- AudioContext state=suspended prompt exists but transition to running has no visual confirmation.

### Polish - Graceful degradation (my additions)
- No offline/storage-full handling UI. R-UNW-06 requires notification when IndexedDB is full during save -- is this implemented?
- No audio decode failure UI. R-UNW-03 requires error with filename and format suggestion -- verify this surfaces in MediaPoolPanel.
- No malformed session JSON recovery dialog. R-UNW-08 requires recovery dialog -- verify session-recovery.ts surfaces this properly in UI.
- Missing keyboard shortcuts panel discoverability -- first-time users dont know ? opens it. Add subtle hint in transport bar.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Mixer shows 'No tracks. Click + to add one.' empty state
- Piano roll shows 'Select a MIDI clip' empty state when no clip selected
- Media pool shows loading skeleton while waveform peaks compute
- Import errors auto-dismiss after 5 seconds with manual dismiss option
- Audio engine initialization shows brief loading indicator
- BPM input shows valid range on focus/hover
- Recording-armed tracks show hot pink indicator per spec
- Keyboard shortcuts hint visible for new users (subtle '?' hint)
- browser_evidence: screenshots of empty states, error dismissal, loading state

## Files
- src/ui/mixer/MixerPanel.tsx
- src/ui/piano-roll/PianoRollEditor.tsx
- src/ui/media-pool/MediaPoolPanel.tsx
- src/App.tsx (or ClickToStart area)
- src/ui/layout/DawShell.tsx
- src/ui/transport/TransportBar.tsx
- src/ui/arrangement/ArrangementPanel.tsx
- src/ui/primitives/ErrorBoundary.tsx (if exists)

DEPENDS ON
  → ✓ long-running-harness-0yz: Polish: QA verification via browser automation ● P1
